title: syringa villosa var. aureovariegata
intro: Syringa villosa var. aureovariegata, also known as Golden Variegated Tree Lilac, is a variety of flowering plant in the Syringa genus, characterized by its golden-yellow variegated leaves and fragrant purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Syringa villosa var. aureovariegata include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
